16:9 horizontal Chinese blog cover illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor: red hair, black outfit, small cross motif, cute but purposeful. The article idea comes first; Avilia must be doing the core action, not posing.

On the left, loose prompt bubbles drift uncertainly; on the right, a crisp 16:9 canvas frame and simple ruler marks show stability.

Composition: lots of white space, black/red/white visual identity, a tiny amount of blue only for system feedback. Hand-drawn editorial blog style, not PPT, not a product poster, not a full character sheet. Minimal handwritten Chinese labels: "愿望" near the bubbles, "参数" near the command plaque, "稳定尺寸" near the canvas.
